title: OpenAEO - AI Infrastructure Layer
summary: OpenAEO is an open-source infrastructure layer that enables websites to become AI-readable, verifiable, and privacy-aware. It addresses the invisibility of websites to AI systems by providing a modular toolkit.
key_facts: Transforms web content into machine-readable formats
